complaint: I've had a cough for 3 months, and sometimes I see blood when I cough.

simulated_answers.cough_duration: The cough has been going on continuously for over 3 months, it doesn't stop.

simulated_answers.weight_loss: I've lost a lot of weight, my clothes have become very loose.

simulated_answers.shortness_of_breath: Yes, I get tired and breathless very quickly now.
